description_long: This kiosk features a large, flat, rectangular roof that extends well beyond the main structure, providing ample shade and coverage. The kiosk's body is compact and boxy, with a combination of white and dark panels, and includes signage with visible text and graphics on the front and side. The front area appears to have a service counter or window, likely for customer interaction, and there are no visible doors or windows on the other sides. The materials suggest a mix of metal, composite panels, and glass, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The roof is flat and sleek, with no visible decorative elements or overhangs beyond its main extension. The overall design is minimalist, focusing on function and clear branding.
description: A modern, boxy kiosk with a large flat roof, white and dark panels, and prominent front signage. The design is minimalist and functional, with a service counter and no visible doors or windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the service counter, signage, and the extended flat roof.
description_view_1: Top view highlighting the expansive, featureless flat roof with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear-side view showing the plain back and side panels, with minimal features and no signage.
description_view_3: Bottom-up angled view revealing the underside of the roof, interior counter area, and additional signage.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and digital signage on the front and side panels, including visible text and graphics.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, rectangular roof extending beyond the kiosk body, made of metal or composite panels, with a sleek finish.
